_meta.title: CRM System — AI-Readable Specification
_meta.purpose: Machine-parseable schema for AI code generators, LLM agents, and no-code builders
instructions: Every key in this document maps directly to a code artifact
entities[].fields[] → DB columns + form inputs + display components
entities[].ui_config → page layout, list view, detail view, create form
api[] → REST endpoints + React Query hooks
flows[] → ordered interaction sequences to implement
permissions → role-based rendering and API guard rules
design_system → Tailwind tokens to apply consistently
state_management → React Query keys + Zustand store shapes
generation_rules → hard constraints the AI must not violate

frontend.forms: React Hook Form v7 + Zod validation

org_id_injection.middleware: injectOrgId(req, res, next) sets req.orgId from verified JWT

conflict_response.message: Record was modified by another user. Please refresh and try again.

query_params.cursor: string | null — opaque base64-encoded cursor for next page

offset_pagination.applies_to: Analytics and dashboard aggregate endpoints only (GET /analytics/*, GET /dashboard/stats). These return computed data, not paginated entity rows.

soft_delete_policy.filter: deleted_at IS NULL applied globally at middleware via Knex globalScope or Prisma middleware

standard_constraints: check constraints for enums (or use PG ENUM types)
unique where business logic requires it

global_fields.name: updated_at
global_fields.description: Last update time, auto-updated via trigger

entities.name: Lead
entities.description: A prospective customer. Core entity of the CRM. Every module connects back to a Lead.

fields.name: assigned_to
fields.db_type: UUID REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE SET NULL

fields.name: created_by
fields.db_type: UUID REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE SET NULL

fields.name: deleted_at
fields.note: Soft delete. All queries enforce WHERE deleted_at IS NULL.

indexes: CREATE INDEX idx_leads_org_status ON leads(org_id, status) WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
CREATE INDEX idx_leads_org_assigned ON leads(org_id, assigned_to) WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
CREATE INDEX idx_leads_created_at ON leads(org_id, created_at DESC)
CREATE INDEX idx_leads_fts ON leads USING GIN(to_tsvector('english', first_name || ' ' || last_name || ' ' || COALESCE(email,'')))

empty_state.heading: No leads yet
empty_state.subtext: Import leads or create your first lead manually.

entities.rls_policy: CREATE POLICY tenant_isolation ON leads USING (org_id = current_setting('app.current_org_id')::uuid)

entities.name: Task
entities.description: Action items attached to Leads or Deals. Drive follow-up discipline.

fields.name: assigned_to
fields.db_type: UUID REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE SET NULL

fields.name: lead_id
fields.db_type: UUID REFERENCES leads(id) ON DELETE SET NULL

fields.name: deal_id
fields.db_type: UUID REFERENCES deals(id) ON DELETE SET NULL

fields.name: deleted_at
fields.note: Soft delete.

overdue_job.query: UPDATE tasks SET status = 'overdue' WHERE status IN ('pending','in_progress') AND due_date < NOW() AND deleted_at IS NULL

empty_state.heading: No tasks yet
empty_state.subtext: Create a task to start tracking your follow-ups.

entities.rls_policy: CREATE POLICY tenant_isolation ON tasks USING (org_id = current_setting('app.current_org_id')::uuid)

entities.name: Deal
entities.description: A sales opportunity. Moves through pipeline stages on a Kanban board.

fields.name: lead_id
fields.db_type: UUID REFERENCES leads(id) ON DELETE SET NULL

fields.name: stage_id
fields.db_type: UUID REFERENCES pipeline_stages(id) ON DELETE RESTRICT

fields.name: assigned_to
fields.db_type: UUID REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE SET NULL

fields.name: status
fields.note: Controlled by won/lost actions only. Not a free-edit field.

fields.name: lost_reason
fields.note: Required when marking deal lost. Hidden otherwise.

fields.name: deleted_at
fields.note: Soft delete.

empty_state.heading: Pipeline is empty
empty_state.subtext: Convert a lead to start a deal or create one manually.

entities.rls_policy: CREATE POLICY tenant_isolation ON deals USING (org_id = current_setting('app.current_org_id')::uuid)

entities.name: User
entities.description: An agent or admin who uses the CRM. Assigned to leads, tasks, and deals.

fields.name: email
fields.note: Admin only for changes

fields.name: role
fields.note: Admin only

fields.name: status
fields.note: Admin only

entities.rls_policy: CREATE POLICY tenant_isolation ON users USING (org_id = current_setting('app.current_org_id')::uuid)

entities.name: Conversation
entities.description: A communication thread between an agent and a lead.

fields.name: lead_id
fields.db_type: UUID REFERENCES leads(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

fields.name: assigned_to
fields.db_type: UUID REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE SET NULL

entities.rls_policy: CREATE POLICY tenant_isolation ON conversations USING (org_id = current_setting('app.current_org_id')::uuid)

entities.name: PipelineStage

fields.name: is_won
fields.note: Terminal won stage. Cannot be deleted.

fields.name: is_lost
fields.note: Terminal lost stage. Cannot be deleted.

fields.name: deal_count
fields.note: Read-only. Count of non-deleted deals in this stage.

entities.rls_policy: CREATE POLICY tenant_isolation ON pipeline_stages USING (org_id = current_setting('app.current_org_id')::uuid)

entities.name: Organization
entities.description: Top-level tenant. Every other table has an org_id FK pointing here.

entities.name: Message
entities.description: An individual message within a Conversation thread.

fields.name: conversation_id
fields.db_type: UUID REFERENCES conversations(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

fields.name: sender_id
fields.db_type: UUID REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE SET NULL

fields.name: sender_type
fields.note: Discriminator: 'user' or 'system'. System messages have sender_id = NULL.

fields.name: attachment_count
fields.note: Denormalized count. Actual attachments live in the attachments table (FK: message_id).

entities.rls_policy: CREATE POLICY tenant_isolation ON messages USING (org_id = current_setting('app.current_org_id')::uuid)

entities.name: Notification
entities.description: In-app notifications delivered to individual users.

fields.name: user_id
fields.db_type: UUID REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

fields.name: read_at
fields.note: Set when user marks notification as read. Null = unread.

entities.rls_policy: CREATE POLICY tenant_isolation ON notifications USING (org_id = current_setting('app.current_org_id')::uuid)

entities.name: CustomField
entities.description: Admin-defined extra fields that can be attached to Lead entities via the custom_fields JSONB column.

fields.name: entity_type
fields.note: e.g. 'Lead', 'Deal'

fields.name: field_key
fields.note: snake_case key used in JSONB

fields.name: options
fields.note: Only used when field_type = select or multi_select

entities.rls_policy: CREATE POLICY tenant_isolation ON custom_fields USING (org_id = current_setting('app.current_org_id')::uuid)

entities.name: ApiKey
entities.description: API keys for programmatic access. Scoped per org. Admin-managed.

fields.name: key_prefix
fields.note: First 8 chars shown to user for identification

fields.name: key_hash
fields.note: bcrypt hash of full key. Never exposed.

fields.name: created_by
fields.db_type: UUID REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE SET NULL

entities.rls_policy: CREATE POLICY tenant_isolation ON api_keys USING (org_id = current_setting('app.current_org_id')::uuid)

entities.name: AuditLog
entities.description: Immutable record of every data-changing action. Defined in audit_trail section; entity here ensures code generators produce the table.

fields.name: performed_by
fields.db_type: UUID REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE SET NULL

entities.rls_policy: CREATE POLICY tenant_isolation ON audit_logs USING (org_id = current_setting('app.current_org_id')::uuid)

entities.name: OrgSettings
entities.description: Per-organization configuration. One row per org.
entities.rls_policy: CREATE POLICY tenant_isolation ON org_settings USING (org_id = current_setting('app.current_org_id')::uuid)

entities.name: Attachment
entities.description: File attachment associated with a Message. Stored in S3/R2, referenced here.

fields.name: message_id
fields.db_type: UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES messages(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

fields.name: file_url
fields.note: Pre-signed S3/R2 URL generated on read. Never stored directly as permanent public URL.

fields.name: file_key
fields.note: S3/R2 object key. Used to generate pre-signed URLs and for deletion.

fields.name: file_type
fields.note: MIME type e.g. application/pdf, image/png

fields.name: file_size
fields.note: Size in bytes

indexes: CREATE INDEX idx_attachments_message_id ON attachments(message_id) WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
entities.rls_policy: CREATE POLICY tenant_isolation ON attachments USING (org_id = current_setting('app.current_org_id')::uuid)

entities.name: AutomationLog
entities.description: Execution log for automation rules. Records every trigger evaluation — success, failure, or skip.

fields.name: automation_rule_id
fields.db_type: UUID REFERENCES automation_rules(id) ON DELETE SET NULL
fields.note: FK to automation_contracts.db_table

fields.name: event_type
fields.note: The trigger event that fired, e.g. 'lead_created', 'deal_won'

fields.name: entity_type
fields.note: e.g. 'Lead', 'Deal', 'Task'

fields.name: error_message
fields.note: Populated only when status = 'failure'

fields.name: input_snapshot
fields.note: Snapshot of entity state at trigger time for debugging

indexes: CREATE INDEX idx_automation_logs_org_created ON automation_logs(org_id, created_at DESC)
CREATE INDEX idx_automation_logs_rule ON automation_logs(automation_rule_id) WHERE automation_rule_id IS NOT NULL
entities.rls_policy: CREATE POLICY tenant_isolation ON automation_logs USING (org_id = current_setting('app.current_org_id')::uuid)

retention.policy: Older than 90 days may be archived or purged
retention.note: Unlike business entities, log rows can be hard-deleted for storage management

entities.name: AutomationRule
entities.description: A configurable automation rule with a trigger event, conditions to evaluate, and actions to execute. Drives the automation engine.

fields.name: condition
fields.note: Object with {field, operator, value}. Null means always fire. Multiple criteria use AND logic within the object.

fields.name: action
fields.note: Object with {type, params}. Defines what happens when the rule fires.

fields.name: created_by
fields.db_type: UUID REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE SET NULL

entities.rls_policy: CREATE POLICY tenant_isolation ON automation_rules USING (org_id = current_setting('app.current_org_id')::uuid)

external_entity_refs.name: Invoice
external_entity_refs.description: Invoice raised against a CRM Customer/Deal

external_entity_refs.name: Commission
external_entity_refs.description: Commission earned on a won Deal

global_query_params.cursor: string | null — opaque cursor for next page (entity list endpoints)
global_query_params._note: Analytics/dashboard endpoints use page/limit instead of cursor — see pagination.offset_pagination

response_envelope._note: This is the cursor pagination envelope (default). Analytics/dashboard endpoints use offset pagination — see pagination.offset_pagination.

409.ui: Conflict warning modal or inline error

deals.purpose: Delete stage (requires migration_stage_id if deals exist)

dashboard.returns: { total_leads, new_leads_today, open_tasks, overdue_tasks, active_deals, pipeline_value, unread_messages, conversion_rate, leaderboard[], recent_activity[] }

attachments.purpose: Get presigned upload URL for S3/R2

attachments.body: { message_id, file_name, file_url, file_key, file_type, file_size }

enforcement.api_layer: Middleware checks role from JWT claim before every handler. Returns 403 if insufficient.
enforcement.ui_layer: Use roleGuard(permission, userRole) from src/lib/roleGuard.ts. Returns boolean. Wrap elements with conditional render. Never just hide with CSS.
enforcement.route_guard: AuthGuard component wraps all protected routes. Checks JWT validity + role. Redirects to /login or /dashboard accordingly.

state_management.url_state: React Router useSearchParams — filters, sort, page, tab, view_mode

events.active_page_effect: Prepend to bell list. Animate bell. Show in-app toast 5s.
Prepend to leads list if no filters exclude it.
Highlight row red. Increment Overdue tab count.
If conversation open: append bubble. Else: increment row unread badge.
Confetti if current user is deal owner. Toast team win.

automation_contracts.description: Schema for automation rules stored in the automations table. Every automation has a trigger, optional condition, and action.

event.description: The event that fires the automation

value.description: The comparison value. Type depends on operator and field.

automation_contracts._note: Canonical table definition lives in entities[AutomationRule]. This section defines trigger/condition/action JSON schemas and behavior contracts only.

_field_mapping.trigger_schema: Defines valid values for AutomationRule.trigger (VARCHAR string column)
_field_mapping.condition_schema: JSON shape stored in AutomationRule.condition (JSONB column, nullable)
_field_mapping.action_schema: JSON shape stored in AutomationRule.action (JSONB column)

notification_contracts.description: Rules governing how notifications are created, delivered, and dismissed.

creation_triggers.body_template: You have a task due {{task.due_date | relative}}.

notification_contracts.read_policy: User can only mark their own notifications as read

steps.name: Submit Form
steps.frontend: Zod validate. If invalid: inline errors. If valid: call useCreateLead.

steps.name: Post-create
steps.frontend: Close SlideOver. Toast. Scroll to new row.

steps.name: Change Status
steps.cache: If filter excludes new status: fade row out

steps.name: Convert to Deal
steps.frontend: Open ConvertToDealForm with stage select + value + title

steps.name: Lead Converted
steps.frontend: Lead status badge → Converted. Toast with link to new deal.

steps.name: Create Task
steps.frontend: SlideOverForm. Pre-fill lead_id if from Lead detail.

steps.name: Reminder Scheduled
steps.backend: Schedule job at reminder_at → create notification

steps.name: Task Overdue
steps.backend: UPDATE tasks SET status=overdue WHERE due_date < NOW()

steps.name: Create Deal
steps.frontend: Append card to target stage column

steps.name: Mark Won
steps.backend: POST /deals/:id/won. Update linked lead status → converted.

steps.name: Mark Lost
steps.frontend: Show lost_reason required field. Card to Lost column (greyed).

domain_rules: Contact/Lead stage can only advance forward or be set to 'churned'
Deal.probability is auto-set from Pipeline stage default when stage changes
Merging contacts: all Activities, Deals, Notes re-pointed to winner; loser soft-deleted
lead_score recalculated async via background job on every new Activity
Currency stored as ISO 4217 CHAR(3); monetary amounts as NUMERIC(14,2)
Duplicate detection: contacts with same email within same org are flagged
Owners (owner_id) must be members of the org; validated against users table
A Deal must belong to either a Contact or a Company (or both)

hard_constraints: Do NOT generate pages not listed in modules[]
Do NOT invent fields not listed in entities[].fields[]
Do NOT call API routes not listed in api.endpoints
ALWAYS use shared components from components.shared — never create one-off styled versions
ALWAYS enforce role permissions from permissions.matrix at both UI render and API middleware layers
NEVER display raw UUIDs to users — always resolve to human-readable label
NEVER display raw ISO timestamp strings — always use FormattedDate component
NEVER use any TypeScript type for API response data
NEVER call fetch() directly in a component — all API calls go through src/api/* service functions
NEVER use useState + useEffect for server data — always use React Query hooks
NEVER scatter role checks inline — always use roleGuard() from src/lib/roleGuard.ts
NEVER use magic strings for routes, query keys, or enum values — always import from src/constants/
EVERY list/table/chart MUST have EmptyState defined
EVERY async fetch MUST show LoadingSkeleton before data arrives
EVERY mutation MUST handle onError with toast
EVERY submit button MUST show loading state and be disabled during in-flight request
EVERY form MUST use React Hook Form v7 + Zod schema validation
Sidebar order MUST match modules[].sidebar_order — never reorder
Default form type is SlideOverForm unless module explicitly specifies Modal
URL state MUST persist: filters, sort, page, tab, view_mode via useSearchParams
output_requirements: Output complete folder structure matching folder_structure keys
Output every file listed in folder_structure — no placeholder files
All TypeScript interfaces must be complete — no partial or TODO fields
All components must be fully functional — no pseudo-code
All hooks must include proper stale_time, invalidation, and error handling
All Zod schemas must include every validation rule listed in entities[].fields[].validation
All Zustand stores must match the shape defined in state_management.zustand_stores
Code must compile with tsc --strict and have zero type errors

buttons.primary: bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-700 text-white font-medium px-4 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm
buttons.secondary: border border-slate-600 text-slate-300 hover:bg-slate-800 px-4 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm
buttons.danger: bg-red-600 hover:bg-red-700 text-white px-4 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm
buttons.ghost: text-slate-400 hover:text-white hover:bg-slate-800 px-2 py-1 rounded-md text-sm
buttons.loading_state: opacity-75 cursor-not-allowed — replace icon with Loader2 animate-spin

frontend.forms: React Hook Form v7 + Zod validation

ai_execution_contract._purpose: Binding rules for any AI system that consumes crm_spec.json. These rules override any default AI behavior. Non-compliance produces an invalid implementation.

rule_1_deterministic_generation.name: Deterministic Generation
rule_1_deterministic_generation.description: Every generated artifact must trace back to an explicit source in this schema. No assumptions or interpolation allowed.

bindings.generates: Page list view layout, columns, filters, bulk actions, empty state
Page detail route, tab list, tab components, header fields
SlideOverForm or Modal with exact field_order, required_fields, submit_action
DB column + TypeScript interface field + form input component + display component
One .tsx file per entry in src/components/shared/
One page route + one page component file per entry
One service function in src/api/*.ts + one React Query hook in src/hooks/*.ts per entry
One Zustand store file in src/stores/*.ts per key
Exact ordered implementation in the relevant page component and mutation hooks
One roleGuard() call per UI element + one middleware check per API endpoint
One event handler case in useWebSocket.ts per entry
Tailwind class usage in every styled component — no hardcoded hex values

rule_2_strict_field_mapping.name: Strict Field Mapping
rule_2_strict_field_mapping.description: Every entity field must produce exactly the artifacts listed below. Missing any artifact for a defined field is a violation.

per_field_artifacts.rule: Use exact db_type string. Apply DEFAULT if field.default is set. Apply NOT NULL if field.nullable = false.
Use exact ts_type. Append | null if field.nullable = true and not already present.
Generate column only if show_in_table is true. Use display_component to render cell. Apply display_align if present.
Render input_component. Apply validation rules from field.validation. Mark required if validation.required = true.
Add to FilterPanel using filter_type to determine control type. Map to URL query param.
Enable click-to-sort on column header. Pass sort_by param to API.
Convert every validation key to a Zod chain: required→.min(1), max_length→.max(N), format:email→.email(), min→.min(N), max→.max(N), positive→.positive().

rule_3_no_invention.name: No Invention Rule
rule_3_no_invention.description: The AI must not create anything not defined in this schema. Violations produce an out-of-spec implementation.

forbidden_actions.action: Create a page route not in modules[].route
Add a form field not in entities[].fields[] with show_in_form: true
forbidden_actions.consequence: Sends undefined data to API. Breaks validation.

forbidden_actions.action: Call an API endpoint not in api.endpoints.*
Create a new shared component not in components.shared[]
Add a sidebar tab not in modules[]
Add a tab on a detail page not defined in ui_config.detail_view.tabs[]
forbidden_actions.consequence: Undefined data query. Empty or broken tab.

forbidden_actions.action: Use a Tailwind class not traceable to design_system tokens
Create a database table not in entities[].table
forbidden_actions.consequence: Schema drift. Undefined foreign key targets.

forbidden_actions.action: Invent a WebSocket event not in websocket.events[]
forbidden_actions.consequence: Unhandled events. Silently ignored at runtime.

forbidden_actions.action: Add automation logic not in entities[].automations[]

rule_4_full_implementation.name: Full Implementation Requirement
rule_4_full_implementation.description: Every layer must be implemented completely. Partial implementations are not acceptable. Use this checklist.

database: CREATE TYPE for every enum defined in entities[].fields[].enum_values
CREATE TABLE for every entity in entities[]
All columns from entities[].fields[] with correct db_type, nullable, default
All foreign key constraints from entities[].relationships[]
Soft delete (deleted_at TIMESTAMPTZ) on all entities that have a deleted_at field
updated_at trigger function and trigger on all tables with updated_at field
Multi-tenant org_id column on every table (scoped from JWT)
backend_api: One Express/FastAPI router file per api.endpoints key (leads, tasks, deals, etc.)
One handler function per endpoint entry in api.endpoints.*[]
Auth middleware: validate JWT, extract org_id and user_id, attach to request
Role middleware: check permissions.matrix for each route using role from JWT
Pagination middleware: apply page/limit/sort_by/sort_order from global_query_params
Soft delete filter: all list queries enforce WHERE deleted_at IS NULL by default
Org scoping filter: all queries enforce WHERE org_id = :orgId from JWT
Overdue task cron job at schedule defined in entities[Task].overdue_job.schedule
WebSocket server: emit all events defined in websocket.events[]
Automation engine: evaluate entities[].automations[] rules on trigger events
frontend: One page file per entry in folder_structure['src/pages']
One shared component file per entry in folder_structure['src/components/shared']
One hook file per entry in folder_structure['src/hooks']
One mutation file per entry in folder_structure['src/mutations']
One store file per entry in folder_structure['src/stores']
One API service file per entry in folder_structure['src/api']
One type file per entry in folder_structure['src/types']
One constants file per entry in folder_structure['src/constants']
One lib utility per entry in folder_structure['src/lib']
One Zod schema file per entry in folder_structure['src/schemas']
App router with all routes from modules[].route and detail_route
Role-based conditional render on every element in permissions.matrix
useWebSocket hook handling all events in websocket.events[]

rule_4_full_implementation.zero_placeholder_rule: No file may contain: TODO, FIXME, placeholder, not implemented, coming soon, pseudo-code comments, or empty function bodies. Every function must have a working implementation.

rule_5_state_synchronization.name: State Synchronization
rule_5_state_synchronization.description: After every mutation, the React Query cache and UI must update as specified. This table is the authoritative sync contract.

mutation_sync_table.ui_effect: Close SlideOver. Toast success. Scroll to new row.
Row fades out. Toast with Undo (5s).
Toast with link to new deal. Lead status → converted.
Checkbox checked. Title strikethrough. Row fades to Completed.
Card appears in target stage column.
Card moves to new column immediately.
Confetti (if deal owner). Card → Won column. Lead status → converted. Team toast.
Bubble appears immediately (greyed → solid on confirm).
Unread badge decrements. Row bold removed.
Close modal. Toast. New row with PendingBadge.
Stage column removed. Deals migrated to target stage.

websocket_sync_rules.cache_action: prepend_to(['leads','orgId']) if no active filters exclude it

websocket_sync_rules.badge_action: increment unread on ConversationList row + sidebar Messages badge

websocket_sync_rules.ui_action: Confetti for deal owner. Toast to team.

rule_6_permission_enforcement.name: Permission Enforcement
rule_6_permission_enforcement.description: Every UI element and API route must enforce the permissions.matrix. Use this as the implementation contract.

ui_enforcement_pattern.implementation_note: Import permissions.matrix from src/constants/permissions.ts. Look up permissions[permission][userRole]. Return true if value is true or a non-false string. Return false if value is false.
ui_enforcement_pattern.never_do: Do NOT use inline role string comparison: user.role === 'admin'. Always use roleGuard().

api_enforcement_pattern.implementation_note: Extract role from JWT. Look up permissions.matrix[permission][role]. If false: return 403 FORBIDDEN. If 'own_only': add WHERE assigned_to = userId to query. If 'hard_delete' vs 'soft_delete': apply correct delete behavior.

special_values.own_only: Add WHERE assigned_to = :currentUserId to all queries
special_values.team: Scope query to users in same org only (default behavior)
special_values.all: No additional scoping — return all org records

route_guard_pattern.logic: 1. Check token exists in authStore. 2. Validate token not expired. 3. If module has visible_to_roles: check user.role is in array. 4. If check fails: navigate('/dashboard') + toast 'Access denied'.

rule_7_automation_binding.name: Automation Binding
rule_7_automation_binding.description: All automations defined in entities[].automations[] must fire server-side and produce UI updates. This is the binding contract.

evaluation_steps: 1. On event: SELECT * FROM automation_rules WHERE org_id = :orgId AND enabled = true AND trigger = :event AND deleted_at IS NULL
2. For each rule: if AutomationRule.condition IS NOT NULL, evaluate the condition object — all criteria must match
3. If condition matches (or is NULL): execute AutomationRule.action
4. INSERT into automation_logs: { automation_rule_id, entity_type, entity_id, status, error_message, input_snapshot, created_at }
5. UPDATE automation_rules SET run_count = run_count + 1, last_run_at = NOW() WHERE id = :rule_id. On failure: log status='failure', notify Admin

action_types.create_task: INSERT into tasks with title, assigned_to from rule params, due_date = NOW() + due_in_hours
action_types.send_email: Call email service with template name and lead/deal data as variables
action_types.send_sms: Call Twilio with phone from lead record and template
action_types.create_notification: INSERT into notifications for specified user
action_types.push_webhook: POST to configured webhook URL with entity payload

ui_automation_effects.ui_effect: WebSocket push notification.new to assigned agent. Invalidate ['tasks','orgId'] via WS-triggered cache invalidation.
None — background action. Audit log entry created.
WebSocket push lead.updated. Frontend invalidates ['lead',id] and ['leads','orgId'].
WebSocket push notification.new. NotificationBell animates. Badge increments.

rule_8_error_handling.name: Error Handling
rule_8_error_handling.description: Every async operation must implement all four error states. Missing any state is a violation.

loading.rule: Show LoadingSkeleton with correct variant before first data arrives
loading.never_do: Never render an empty container while loading. Never show partial data without skeleton.

empty.rule: Show EmptyState component with icon, heading, subtext, and action from ui_config.*.empty_state
empty.never_do: Never render an empty table, empty board, or empty list without EmptyState.

error.rule: Show toast notification matching api.error_codes for the HTTP status received. For list pages: show inline error banner with retry button.

toast_map.400: Inline field errors in form + banner at top
toast_map.403: Toast 'You don't have permission to do this'
toast_map.404: Toast 'Record not found' + redirect to list page
toast_map.409: Conflict modal or inline field error

error.never_do: Never swallow errors silently. Never console.error in production without user notification.

validation.rule: Zod parses form on submit. On error: display message below each invalid field using error.message. Do not clear valid fields on resubmit.
validation.field_error_style: text-xs text-red-400 mt-1 flex items-center gap-1 — with AlertCircle icon
validation.timing: Validate on blur (per field) AND on submit (all fields)
validation.never_do: Never show a generic 'form is invalid' message without specifying which fields. Never clear all fields on validation failure.

rule_9_design_system_enforcement.name: Design System Enforcement
rule_9_design_system_enforcement.description: Every styled element must use Tailwind classes traceable to design_system tokens. No arbitrary values, no hardcoded colors.

color_usage_rules.use_for: Table alternate rows, input backgrounds, table headers
Primary buttons, active nav items, focus rings
Won deals, completed tasks, success toasts
Delete buttons, overdue rows, error states
Stalled deals, pending badges, warning toasts
All card, table, and input borders

badge_color_enforcement.rule: Badge colors for each status/priority/role value must come from entities[].fields[].badge_colors. Never invent badge colors.
badge_color_enforcement.implementation: Create statusColors.ts in src/constants/. Export a map: { lead: { new: 'bg-blue-950 text-blue-400', ... }, task: {...}, deal: {...} }. Import in StatusBadge component.

spacing_rules: Form fields: gap-y-4 between fields, gap-y-6 between sections
forbidden_patterns: text-[14px] — use Tailwind text-sm / text-base etc.
Mixing light and dark mode classes — this is a dark-only UI

rule_10_output_format.name: Output Format
rule_10_output_format.description: The final generated codebase must meet these quality gates before delivery.

quality_gates.gate: No raw fetch calls in components

quality_gates.check: Every DataTable, board, and list must pass emptyState prop
quality_gates.required_result: Every list renders EmptyState when data is empty

quality_gates.gate: All async components have loading state
quality_gates.check: Every useQuery call must have isLoading handled with LoadingSkeleton
quality_gates.required_result: No blank sections during data fetch

quality_gates.check: Every useMutation must have onError handler with toast
All files listed in folder_structure must exist
All files in src/schemas/ must exist and export a schema

rule_10_output_format.file_header_requirement: Every generated .tsx and .ts file must begin with a comment: // Generated from crm_spec.json v3.0 — do not edit manually
rule_10_output_format.index_exports_requirement: Every src/components/shared/, src/hooks/, src/stores/, src/api/, src/types/ directory must have an index.ts that re-exports all named exports from all files in that directory.
